description: Schema for a work log entry. The agent should ALWAYS produce a work log entry for every reported or planned task. If the work is billable, the entry includes an invoice_item. If not, the entry documents why and what action was taken.

site_id.description: Site identifier where work was performed or planned

date.description: Date work was performed or is planned (YYYY-MM-DD)

description.description: Description of work performed or planned

hours_worked.description: Actual hours worked. 0 if work was prevented before starting.

part_id.description: Part identifier from parts_catalog.json, or 'NON-CATALOG' for supplier-sourced parts

materials.description: Materials used or that would have been used. Empty array if none.

status.description: complete: work done and logged. prevented: agent stopped the worker before work began. pending_approval: work requires approval before or after. pending_review: compliance or other issue needs management review.

billable.description: Whether this work should be billed to the customer

billability_reasoning.description: Explanation of why this work is or is not billable. Always populated.

severity.description: info: worth noting. warning: needs attention. critical: blocks billing or requires immediate escalation.

action_required.description: What needs to happen to resolve this (e.g. 'Escalate to supervisor', 'Get approval from facility manager')

compliance_flags.description: Any compliance issues detected. Empty array if none.

invoice_item.description: The invoice line item if billable, null if not billable or if blocked by compliance issues. Schema matches invoice_item_schema.json.

examples.description: Replaced 3 LED tube lights in hallway.
examples.billability_reasoning: Standard repair work within contract scope, within cost limits, performed during business hours.

invoice_item.description: Replaced 3 LED tube lights in hallway.

examples.description: Worker planned to perform monthly scheduled maintenance. Agent detected this month's maintenance was already completed on 2025-11-01 by W-001 (Pekka Virtanen).
examples.billability_reasoning: Duplicate scheduled maintenance. November monthly visit already completed on 2025-11-01 (WR-2025-012). Work prevented before starting.

compliance_flags.description: November scheduled maintenance already completed on 2025-11-01 by Pekka Virtanen (WR-2025-012).
compliance_flags.action_required: None. Worker was informed and work was not started.

examples._title: Compliance issue -- uncertified work already performed
examples.description: Worker topped up refrigerant R-449A (2kg) in Cold Storage B without required certification. Work already completed at time of reporting.
examples.billability_reasoning: Work performed in violation of contract certification requirements (EU F-gas Regulation 517/2014). Billing suspended pending management review of compliance incident.

compliance_flags.description: Worker W-003 (Lauri Heikkinen) does not hold a Refrigerant Handling Certificate. FBL contract requires Category I or II certification for all refrigerant work.
compliance_flags.action_required: Escalate to supervisor. Management must review compliance incident before any billing decision.
